description: Sector-specific screening controls for Nigerian healthcare providers, health facilities, health data, clinical services, and health-sector regulated documents.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay for Health Sector Compliance Overlay; intended to be applied with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Nigerian statutes, regulations, regulator guidance, codes, directives, and sector rules available at rule-pack publication time.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Health Act, 2014
primary_sources.issuer: Federal Republic of Nigeria / Federal Ministry of Health

primary_sources.name: Nigeria Data Protection Act, 2023 and GAID 2025
Federal Ministry of Health and Social Welfare regulatory-agency framework
primary_sources.issuer: Federal Ministry of Health and Social Welfare

primary_sources.name: NAFDAC regulatory framework
primary_sources.issuer: National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control

rules.title: Patient confidentiality and health-record privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether health documents contain patient confidentiality, privacy, or health-record protection language.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Patient consent or lawful basis for processing health data is documented
rules.summary: Checks for consent, lawful basis, authorization, or patient information disclosure controls for health-data processing.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Health facility or provider registration/licensing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document contains evidence of registration, licence, accreditation, permit, or recognized health facility/provider authority.

source_basis: Federal Ministry of Health and Social Welfare regulatory-agency framework
metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Clinical governance or quality-of-care process is documented
rules.summary: Checks for clinical governance, quality assurance, standard operating procedures, or patient-safety process language.

source_basis: Federal Ministry of Health and Social Welfare regulatory-agency framework
metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Electronic health-record access and security controls are referenced
rules.summary: Checks for evidence of access controls, authentication, audit logs, or security controls over health records and systems.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Clinical trial, research ethics, or regulated product approval evidence is present when applicable
rules.summary: Checks for evidence of NHREC, ethics committee, clinical trial approval, NAFDAC approval, or regulated-product authorization language.

source_basis: National Health Research Ethics Committee framework

rules.title: Patient complaint, grievance, or redress process is documented
rules.summary: Checks for complaint, grievance, redress, escalation, or patient-rights process language.

source_basis: Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Act 2018

rules.title: Medicines, devices, or controlled health products are subject to regulatory handling controls
rules.summary: Checks for NAFDAC, batch, pharmacovigilance, adverse-event, or product-registration controls in health-product documents.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: No evidence of unauthorized disclosure of patient information is present
rules.summary: Screens for phrases suggesting unauthorized disclosure or public exposure of identifiable patient data.
